zones.name: The Twilight Strand
objectives: Pick up your starting skill gem
zones.tips: Run straight to Hillock and kill him quickly. Grab the skill gem reward, then head to town. Skip all other enemies—they offer minimal experience and slow your progression.

zones.name: Lioneye's Watch
objectives: Talk to Nessa for support gem
zones.tips: Talk to Nessa for your support gem. Grab the Quicksilver Flask (one of your most important leveling items). Stock up on life flasks if you have currency.

zones.name: The Coast
zones.tips: Find the waypoint in the upper-left area of the zone and activate it immediately. Then push forward—don't spend time clearing monsters here.

zones.name: The Mud Flats
zones.tips: Hunt for Rhoa nests scattered across the zone (they're visible on the ground). Kill Rhoas only if they're guarding nests. This is faster than clearing the whole zone.

zones.name: The Submerged Passage
zones.tips: Waypoint is usually in the middle section. Once found, continue forward without clearing side areas.

zones.name: The Ledge
zones.tips: This is a long, linear zone—just keep moving forward. Don't stop to fight unless enemies block the path. Movement speed is more valuable than loot here.

zones.name: The Climb
zones.tips: The waypoint is very close to the entrance. Grab it immediately, then continue toward the prison areas.

zones.name: Lower Prison
zones.tips: Stairs to Upper Prison are typically on the opposite side from where you entered. Head straight there without detouring.

zones.name: Upper Prison
zones.tips: Brutus is a significant first boss—he does physical damage and can hook you. Keep moving to avoid his attacks. If you die, log out and back in (he won't respawn fully).

zones.name: Prisoner's Gate
zones.tips: Waypoint is near the middle. This zone is relatively short—push through to the graveyard.

zones.name: The Ship Graveyard
zones.tips: Cave entrance is usually in the upper area. You can skip the Fairgraves optional boss if rushing.

zones.name: The Ship Graveyard Cave
zones.tips: Linear cave with a straightforward path. Keep moving forward.

zones.name: The Cavern of Wrath
zones.tips: Merveil has two phases with similar mechanics. She teleports and casts cold projectiles—move sideways (not backward) to dodge. Kill her summons if they overwhelm you. Use flasks for survivability.

quests.name: Enemy at the Gate
quests.description: Kill Hillock to complete the first quest
quests.strategyTip: Passive point allocation: Invest in life nodes early. These provide essential survivability throughout the campaign.

quests.name: The Siren's Cadence
quests.description: Defeat Merveil to progress to Act 2
quests.strategyTip: This passive point should also go toward life nodes. Merveil's cold damage makes cold resistance valuable if you're struggling.

quests.name: The Caged Brute
quests.strategyTip: Optional quest offering a skill gem reward. Useful if you're missing specific gems for your build.

passiveCheckpoints.strategy: Focus on life nodes. Early survivability is crucial.
Focus on life nodes. Early survivability is crucial.

nodes: Pick up damage or defense notable
passiveCheckpoints.strategy: Combine life nodes with damage scaling. Your weapon upgrades are more important than pure damage nodes.
Combine life nodes with damage scaling. Your weapon upgrades are more important than pure damage nodes.

zones.name: The Southern Forest
zones.tips: Waypoint is usually on the left side. Grab it first, then continue toward the camp.

zones.name: The Forest Encampment
zones.tips: Town area. Talk to Bestel for the quest, stock up on flasks if you have currency.

zones.name: The Riverways
zones.tips: Navigate toward the Sanctuary. Contains waypoints for quick travel.

zones.name: The Western Forest
zones.tips: Weaver's Chambers entrance is usually in the top area. The Weaver is dangerous if your defenses are low—stay mobile and use flasks.

zones.name: The Weaver's Chambers
zones.tips: Linear dungeon. The Weaver deals physical damage—kite around obstacles if necessary. This is a quick dungeon if you keep moving.

zones.name: The Wetlands
objectives: Optional: Get Oak's amulet for passive point
zones.tips: Optional area with the bandit Oak. Deciding to fight or ally with bandits depends on your build—most players eventually kill all three for passive points.

zones.name: The Vaal Ruins
zones.tips: Leads to the Vaal Overseer boss fight. The Overseer has multiple attack patterns (projectiles, quakes, lasers). Stay mobile and move perpendicular to avoid laser attacks.

zones.name: The Northern Forest
zones.tips: Large zone connecting multiple areas.

zones.name: The Caverns
zones.tips: Navigate toward the boss encounter. Keep moving and avoid lingering in monster packs.

zones.name: The Ancient Pyramid
zones.tips: Optional zone with Vaal enemies. Contains valuable altar drops but isn't necessary for progression.

quests.name: Deal with the Bandits
quests.reward: 1 Passive Skill Point or Bandit Reward
quests.location: Kill all bandits or help one

passiveCheckpoints.strategy: Combine life nodes with damage scaling. Your weapon upgrades are more important than pure damage nodes.
Combine life nodes with damage scaling. Your weapon upgrades are more important than pure damage nodes.

nodes: Path towards keystone or major cluster
passiveCheckpoints.strategy: Balance life and damage. Resistance management becomes important. Consider nodes that help with pathing toward resistance clusters.

zones.name: The City of Sarn
zones.tips: Large hub zone. Explore to find the Market Square and other amenities. The Catacombs entrance is here.

zones.name: The Sarn Encampment
zones.tips: Town area—the largest in the game. Grab supplies and prepare for what's ahead.

zones.name: The Slums
zones.tips: First zone of Act 3. Waypoint is here. Stock up on supplies before proceeding deeper into the city.

zones.name: The Crematorium
zones.tips: Contains burning ground hazards. Avoid standing in the fire and keep moving. The waypoint is usually accessible from the main path.

zones.name: The Sewers
zones.tips: Contains optional hidden busts for the Victario's Secret quest (rewards passive points and respec points). Linear navigation—follow the main path if rushing.

zones.name: The Marketplace
zones.tips: Another Trial location. Waypoint is central.

zones.name: The Catacombs
zones.tips: Multiple Trials of Ascendancy are located here (3 trials total across Acts 1-3). Complete them to unlock the Labyrinth later. Essential for progression.

zones.name: The Battlefront
zones.tips: Navigate through enemy-filled zones. Keep moving toward the prison.

zones.name: The Docks
zones.tips: Navigate toward the cavern. Keep moving forward.

zones.name: The Solaris Temple Level 1
zones.tips: Indoor temple. Keep moving upward.

zones.name: The Solaris Temple Level 2
zones.tips: Waypoint is at the exit to Ebony Barracks.

zones.name: The Ebony Barracks
zones.tips: Major waypoint hub for Act 3.

zones.name: The Lunaris Temple Level 1
zones.tips: Mirror of Solaris Temple.

zones.name: The Lunaris Temple Level 2
zones.tips: Piety fight. Watch out for lightning arrows phase.

zones.name: The Imperial Gardens
zones.tips: Outdoor zone. Waypoint is central.

zones.name: The Sceptre of God
zones.tips: Multi-floor tower. Dominus has two phases - dodge his blood rain.

quests.name: Victario's Secrets
quests.description: Find hidden busts in Act 3 Sewers
quests.strategyTip: Rewards a passive point and two respec points. Useful for path corrections later. Can be skipped for speed.

passiveCheckpoints.strategy: Balance life and damage. Resistance management becomes important. Consider nodes that help with pathing toward resistance clusters.
Balance life and damage. Resistance management becomes important. Consider nodes that help with pathing toward resistance clusters.

nodes: Path to next major notable or keystone
passiveCheckpoints.strategy: Balance life and damage. Resistance management becomes important. Consider nodes that help with pathing toward resistance clusters.

zones.name: Highgate
zones.tips: Final zone before Malachai. Boss preparation and final push. Stock up on supplies.

zones.name: The Dried Lake
zones.tips: Excellent experience farming zone with good monster density. Farm here if underleveled before entering dangerous mines.

zones.name: The Mines Level 1
zones.tips: Deshret's Spirit unlocks a skill point later.

zones.name: The Mines Level 2
objectives: Find Deshret's Spirit if not found yet
zones.tips: Release Deshret's Spirit to complete An Indomitable Spirit.

zones.name: The Crystal Veins
zones.tips: Waypoint is at the end of the zone, splitting into two paths.

zones.name: Kaom's Dream
zones.tips: Long linear zone with lots of fire damage.

zones.name: Kaom's Stronghold
zones.tips: Kaom hits hard physically. Kite him.

zones.name: Daresso's Dream
zones.tips: Accessed from Crystal Veins. You must fight through arenas.

zones.name: The Grand Arena
zones.tips: Daresso uses cold/phys attacks. Watch for his blade vortices.

zones.name: The Belly of the Beast Level 1
zones.tips: Talk to Dialla in Crystal Veins to open the path.

zones.name: The Belly of the Beast Level 2
zones.tips: Piety transforms into a beam-firing abomination. Circle her.

zones.name: The Harvest
zones.tips: Optional zone with unique mechanics and altars for crafting. Can be skipped if rushing but offers valuable crafting opportunities.

zones.name: The Ascent
zones.tips: Use the lever to activate the device after killing Malachai.

passiveCheckpoints.strategy: Balance life and damage. Resistance management becomes important. Consider nodes that help with pathing toward resistance clusters.

nodes: Ensure fire resistance is capped for Kaom
passiveCheckpoints.strategy: Balance life and damage. Resistance management becomes important. Consider nodes that help with pathing toward resistance clusters.

zones.name: The Slave Pens
zones.tips: Linear start to Act 5. Kill the unique boss at the end and continue.

zones.name: Overseer's Tower
zones.tips: Town hub for Act 5.

zones.name: The Control Blocks
zones.tips: Miasmeter is for a skill point quest. Always get it.

zones.name: Oriath Square
zones.tips: Large open area. Waypoint is near the entrance to Templar Courts.

zones.name: The Templar Courts
objectives: Navigate to The Chamber of Innocence
zones.tips: Indoor zone. Follow the red carpet.

zones.name: The Chamber of Innocence
zones.tips: Avarius transforms into Innocence. Bullet hell phase.

zones.name: The Torched Courts
zones.tips: Backtracking through destroyed courts.

zones.name: The Ruined Square
zones.tips: Central hub. Do Ossuary and Reliquary for skill points.

zones.name: The Ossuary
zones.tips: Contains a Trial of Ascendancy (the third trial). Complete it to unlock Uber Lab. Essential for later progression.

zones.name: The Reliquary
zones.tips: Rewards a passive skill point.

zones.name: The Cathedral Rooftop
zones.tips: Kitava fight is scripted to fail. You will be debuffed after.

passiveCheckpoints.strategy: Optimize based on your build. Life and resistances should be priority. Damage nodes are supplementary.
Optimize based on your build. Life and resistances should be priority. Damage nodes are supplementary.

zones.name: Lioneye's Watch
zones.tips: Talk to Lilly Roth to unlock her gem shop. Clear Twilight Strand if you haven't already. Prepare for the resistance penalty from Act 5 Kitava.

zones.name: The Coast
zones.tips: Same layout as Act 1 but with tougher enemies. Find the waypoint and push forward to Mud Flats.

zones.name: The Mud Flats
zones.tips: Kill The Dishonoured Queen for the Eye of Conquest. The layout is similar to Act 1 but enemies hit harder.

zones.name: The Karui Fortress
zones.tips: Tukohama has totems. Kill them or avoid their beams.

zones.name: The Ridge
zones.tips: Linear outdoor zone.

zones.name: The Lower Prison
zones.tips: Shavronne is in the tower at the end.

zones.name: Prisoner's Gate
zones.tips: Optional Abberath fight for a passive point. Waypoint is central. Continue to Western Forest.

zones.name: The Western Forest
zones.tips: Find the waypoint and continue toward The Riverways. No Weaver in Act 6.

zones.name: The Riverways
zones.tips: Find the waypoint and continue to The Wetlands for the Ryslatha fight.

zones.name: The Wetlands
zones.tips: Kill Ryslatha (Puppet Mistress) in the Spawning Ground for a passive point and Pantheon soul. Then return to Riverways.

zones.name: The Southern Forest
zones.tips: Find the waypoint and head to The Beacon. Almost done with Act 6.

zones.name: The Beacon
zones.tips: Escort mission. Stay in the circle.

zones.name: The Brine King's Reef
zones.tips: Optional boss area. Rewards unique item. Can be skipped if rushing, but worth doing for gear.

passiveCheckpoints.strategy: Optimize based on your build. Life and resistances should be priority. Damage nodes are supplementary.
Optimize based on your build. Life and resistances should be priority. Damage nodes are supplementary.

zones.name: The Bridge Encampment
zones.tips: Town hub for Act 7.

zones.name: The Broken Bridge
zones.tips: Optional crossing area. Contains some challenging packs. Can be skipped if rushing.

zones.name: The Crossroads
zones.tips: Central hub. Go South/Right first.

zones.name: The Fellshrine Ruins
zones.tips: Just run through to the Crypt.

zones.name: The Crypt
zones.tips: Map is in a chest at the end.

zones.name: The Chamber of Sins Level 1
objectives: Use Map Device to enter Maligaro's Sanctum
zones.tips: Center room has the map device.

zones.name: Maligaro's Sanctum
zones.tips: Maligaro summons clones. Kill them quickly.

zones.name: The Chamber of Sins Level 2
zones.tips: Trial is in this zone.

zones.name: The Ashen Fields
zones.tips: Large area leading toward the boss. Find waypoints and continue forward.

zones.name: The Northern Forest
zones.tips: Dread Thicket has a skill point quest (Gruthkul).

zones.name: The Dread Thicket
zones.tips: Optional area, but gives a passive point and Pantheon soul.

zones.name: The Causeway
zones.tips: Kishara's Star is in a chest. Grants a skill point.

zones.name: The Vaal City
zones.tips: Large maze-like zone.

zones.name: The Temple of Decay Level 1
zones.tips: Just run down.

zones.name: The Temple of Decay Level 2
zones.tips: Arakaali is a large spider. Avoid the chaos lasers.

quests.name: The Master of a Million Faces
quests.location: Kill Greust (possessed by Ralakesh) in The Ashen Fields

passiveCheckpoints.strategy: Optimize based on your build. Life and resistances should be priority. Damage nodes are supplementary.

zones.name: The Sarn Ramparts
zones.tips: Short run to town.

zones.name: The Sarn Encampment
zones.tips: Town area—the largest in the game. Grab supplies and prepare for what's ahead.

zones.name: The Toxic Conduits
zones.tips: Linear passage.

zones.name: Doedre's Cesspool
zones.tips: Doedre has a cauldron. Click valve to change debuffs.

zones.name: The Quay
zones.tips: Ankh is for Clarissa quest (Skill point). Tolman fight is optional side area.

zones.name: The Grain Gate
zones.tips: Final zone before the boss.

zones.name: The Imperial Fields
zones.tips: Run towards the temple.

zones.name: The Solaris Temple Level 1
zones.tips: Standard temple layout.

zones.name: The Solaris Temple Level 2
objectives: Return to Town -> Toxic Conduits -> Solaris Concourse
zones.tips: Dawn deals heavy fire damage.

zones.name: The Solaris Concourse
zones.tips: Connects Temple to Bridge.

zones.name: The Harbour Bridge
zones.tips: Skyy Shrine encounter is here.

zones.name: The Lunaris Concourse
zones.tips: Go to Bath House first for wings/trial.

zones.name: The Bath House
zones.tips: Wings give a skill point. Trial is labyrinthine.

zones.name: The High Gardens
objectives: Return to Bath House -> Lunaris Concourse
zones.tips: Navigate through garden-themed zones with various enemies. Keep moving toward the next waypoint.

zones.name: The Lunaris Temple Level 1
zones.tips: Mirror of Solaris.

zones.name: The Lunaris Temple Level 2
zones.tips: Dusk deals cold/phys damage.

zones.name: The Harbour Bridge (Boss)
zones.tips: Focus one then the other. Stay mobile.

passiveCheckpoints.strategy: Optimize based on your build. Life and resistances should be priority. Damage nodes are supplementary.

zones.name: The Blood Aqueduct
zones.tips: Best place to farm Tabula Rasa (Humility cards).

zones.name: Highgate
zones.tips: Final zone before Malachai. Boss preparation and final push. Stock up on supplies.

zones.name: The Descent
zones.tips: Short transition zone using cargo lifts.

zones.name: The Vastiri Desert
objectives: Talk to Petarus/Vanja (Town) to get Bottled Storm
zones.tips: Get Storm Blade first. Then go to Oasis for skill point.

zones.name: The Oasis
zones.tips: Shakari gives a passive point and Pantheon soul. Do not skip.

zones.name: The Foothills
zones.tips: Hub zone. Go to Boiling Lake first.

zones.name: The Boiling Lake
zones.tips: Basilisk has a petrifying gaze.

zones.name: The Tunnel
zones.tips: Trial is here. Zone is linear.

zones.name: The Quarry
zones.tips: Zone before Daresso. Navigate and continue forward.

zones.name: The Refinery
zones.tips: General Adus uses lightning/phys.

zones.name: The Belly of the Beast
zones.tips: Large mine zone with multiple paths. The waypoint is accessible from the main route. Continue toward the next area.

zones.name: The Rotting Core
zones.tips: Navigate toward the final boss arena.

passiveCheckpoints.strategy: Optimize based on your build. Life and resistances should be priority. Damage nodes are supplementary.

zones.name: Oriath Docks
zones.tips: Act 10 Town.

zones.name: The Cathedral Rooftop
zones.tips: Build-up to Kitava. Final preparations here.

zones.name: The Ravaged Square
zones.tips: Final hub before the final boss. Maximize resistances—Kitava applies another 30% penalty here (on top of Act 5's penalty). Aim for 75% resistances after penalties.

zones.name: The Control Blocks
zones.tips: Vilenta gives a passive point.

zones.name: The Reliquary
zones.tips: New layout compared to Act 5. Quest rewards a point.

zones.name: The Ossuary
zones.tips: Contains a Trial of Ascendancy (the third trial). Complete it to unlock Uber Lab. Essential for later progression.

zones.name: The Torched Courts
zones.tips: Run through.

zones.name: The Desecrated Chambers
objectives: Return to Docks -> Ravaged Square -> Canals
zones.tips: Contains the final Kitava encounter. This boss is significantly harder than Act 5's version. The fight alternates between damaging Kitava and destroying his heart. Use defensive flasks liberally.

zones.name: The Canals
zones.tips: Short path to the final zone.

zones.name: The Feeding Trough
zones.tips: Final area before Kitava. Prepare flasks and ensure adequate life totals.

quests.name: An End to Hunger
quests.description: Defeat Kitava at the end of Act 10
quests.strategyTip: Permanent -30% resistance penalty (in addition to Act 5's -30%). Ensure resistances are capped at 75% before fighting if possible.

passiveCheckpoints.strategy: Optimize based on your build. Life and resistances should be priority. Damage nodes are supplementary.
